title: Pagination
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Pagination helpers with navigation/list semantics, current-page state, previous and next controls, ellipsis, disabled link state, local inline icons, and local button/field/select composition.

registry.reason: PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, and PaginationNext compose the local shadcn Button item for link-like button styling and disabled behavior.
The icons-only example composes the local shadcn Field item for the rows-per-page label layout.
The icons-only example composes the local shadcn Select item for the rows-per-page control.
shadcn Pagination uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for Foldkit-native helpers and examples.
Provides Effect Schema metadata for Pagination direction and style options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin previous, next, and ellipsis icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in installable source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic Arabic example data.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: PaginationDemo
examples.description: Default Pagination with previous, numbered pages, current page, ellipsis, and next controls.
examples.snippet:
export const PaginationDemo = (): Html =>
  paginationShell([
    paginationItem([PaginationPrevious<never>({ href: '#' })]),
    paginationItem([paginationLink('1')]),
    paginationItem([paginationLink('2', { isActive: true })]),
    paginationItem([paginationLink('3')]),
    paginationItem([PaginationEllipsis<never>()]),
    paginationItem([PaginationNext<never>({ href: '#' })]),
  ])

examples.title: PaginationIconsOnly
examples.description: Pagination paired with local Field and Select rows-per-page controls.

examples.title: PaginationRtl
examples.description: RTL Pagination using local Arabic strings and numerals instead of the origin language selector runtime.

examples.title: PaginationSimple
examples.description: Simple Pagination with numbered page links only.
examples.snippet:
export const PaginationSimple = (): Html =>
  paginationShell([
    paginationItem([paginationLink('1')]),
    paginationItem([paginationLink('2', { isActive: true })]),
    paginationItem([paginationLink('3')]),
    paginationItem([paginationLink('4')]),
    paginationItem([paginationLink('5')]),
  ])

deviations.summary: Icons use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the previous, next, ellipsis, and icon placement contracts.

deviations.summary: Pagination links use explicit Foldkit anchor rendering through the local Button helper instead of React render-element cloning.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source models link rendering through toView and avoids React Slot or Next Link cloning semantics.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin app language selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin language selector. Local constants preserve the default RTL rendered output.

deviations.summary: The icons-only example composes local Field and Select helpers for the rows-per-page control.
deviations.rationale: The selected dependencies are already local registry items and preserve the documented example without introducing upstream runtime dependencies.
